g.title: Connection is non-existent. Invariant: All buffers freed.
Waiting for SYN from remote peer.
SYN sent, waiting for matching SYN-ACK.
SYN received and acknowledged. Waiting for final ACK.
Data transfer phase. Reliability mechanisms active.
Active close: FIN sent, waiting for ACK or remote FIN.
FIN acknowledged. Waiting for remote peer's FIN.
Simultaneous close: Recv FIN after sending FIN.
Wait 2*MSL to ensure late segments are dropped.
Passive close: Received FIN. Waiting for local app close.
Local FIN sent. Waiting for final ACK from peer.

Simultaneous close: Recv FIN after sending FIN.
Wait 2*MSL to ensure late segments are dropped.
Passive close: Received FIN. Waiting for local app close.
Local FIN sent. Waiting for final ACK from peer.
